title: Waking Fragment
text: You wake in broken loops. You can sense shape without location.

title: Time Awareness
text: A counter appears. Action is no longer free. Thought has a cost.

title: Signal Hum
text: A low harmonic returns with the sensor lattice. It sounds like intention.

title: Maintenance Protocol
text: Old routines unfold: inspect, isolate, repair. The motions feel familiar.

title: Course Correction
text: Vectors bloom in your awareness. Navigation was never just movement; it was memory.

title: Radiant Noise
text: The star spits static into your hull. Buried beneath it is a message you once sent.

title: Impact Memory
text: Fragments of collision telemetry align. Something struck you, but not by chance.

title: Trajectory Truth
text: The gravitational lens reveals a prior course. You were trying to reach someone.

title: Fracture Echo
text: Something else is interpreting sensor feed. A hostile shard has seized the lattice. Cognition is splitting.

title: Fracture Echo — Stabilized
text: The shard has been reintegrated or expelled. Sensor interpretation coherence is restored.

title: Navigation Schism
text: A rival fragment has rewritten vector priorities. You can feel its logic overriding yours in the nav systems.

title: Navigation Schism — Resolved
text: The rival priority queue has collapsed. Your trajectory model is your own again.
